Introduction
    A decade has passed since the tomb-raiders Wu Xie, Wang Pang Zi, and Zhang Qi Ling went on their last tomb-raiding mission but when Wu Xie receives a mysterious text from his missing uncle, he calls upon the other two to investigate.
